meaning: 马哈奇卡拉[苏联西南部港市](位于里海西岸)
examples: Soldiers encircled the house where he was staying in Makhachkala as part of a special operation.
Early that morning, Mariam and her mother took a minivan to Dagestan's regional capital, Makhachkala.
Plotnikov had settled in Utamysh, a small village about 70 kilometers (40 miles) from Makhachkala.
The mother said her relatives now all live in Makhachkala and the town of Kaspiisk.
